title: selliguea digitata
intro: Selliguea digitata, also known as Polypodioides digitata, is a type of fern plant native to Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Selliguea digitata include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Selliguea digitata include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders. Selliguea digitata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and treat various health conditions.
